topic: GitHub Actions Just Got a MASSIVE Upgrade
hook: 71 million jobs per day. 10-level nesting. YAML anchors. Actions is reborn.
audience: DevOps engineers and developers using GitHub Actions
keyTakeaway: GitHub rebuilt Actions architecture in 2025, enabling long-blocked features.
talkingPoints: Start with the scale: 71M jobs per day, up from 23M
Demo YAML anchors - the number 1 requested feature for years
Explain the greater than 10GB cache limit removal
Connect the dots: this powers Copilot coding agent
trendContext: GitHub announced Dec 2025 they rebuilt Actions core to handle 71M daily jobs, shipping YAML anchors and 10-level workflow nesting.
